projectDescription: A cross-platform retro game and console collection tracker built with Rust and egui, supporting desktop (Windows, macOS, Linux), web (WASM), with embedded game databases for consoles, LEGO Dimensions, and Skylanders.
keyFeatures: Track consoles and games across 30+ retro platforms with Owned, Favorite, and Wishlist states
Embedded game database compiled into the binary — no external files required
Cross-platform support: Windows, macOS, Linux, and WebAssembly (browser)
LEGO Dimensions and Skylanders figure tracking tabs
Import/Export collection state as portable JSON
Cross-console search with Unicode normalization and fuzzy matching
Responsive UI that adapts to desktop and mobile screen sizes
Stable content-based game IDs that survive database updates
publicApiSurface: Console struct (id, name, manufacturer, year, variant)
Game struct (id, title, year, publisher, console_id)
GameState struct (game_id, owned, favorite, wishlist, notes)
ConsoleState struct (console_id, owned, favorite, wishlist, notes)
LegoDimensionState struct (figure_id, owned, favorite, wishlist, notes)
SkylanderState struct (skylander_id, owned, favorite, wishlist, notes)
ExportData struct (version, export_date, console_states, consoles, lego_dimensions_states, skylanders_states)
export_data() — export collection to JSON file
import_data() — import collection from JSON file
load_embedded_games() — load all games from compiled-in database
get_hardcoded_consoles() — get list of supported consoles
load_lego_dimensions_figures() — load LEGO Dimensions figure database
save_game_states() / load_game_states() — persist game collection state
save_console_states() / load_all_console_states() — persist console collection state
